name: Kapiltirth Market E-Waste Center
address: Kapiltirth Market, near Mahalakshmi Temple, Kolhapur
note: Municipal e-waste collection point listed for Kolhapur city.
description: This center is a verified municipal collection point located in the bustling Kapiltirth Market, making it highly accessible for residents visiting the city center.
tips: Always remember to factory reset your mobile phones and computers to wipe personal data before dropping them off. Remove any SIM cards or SD cards.
warning: Safety Warning: Do NOT attempt to dismantle lithium-ion batteries yourself, as they can catch fire. Bring them whole to the center. ⚠️

name: Sambhajinagar Filter House Collection Point
note: Collection point suitable for e-waste and dry recyclable drop-off.
description: A spacious collection point equipped to handle both electronics and bulk plastics.
tips: Rinse all plastic containers before dropping them off to avoid contamination.

name: Govind Pansare School Collection Office
note: Ward-level collection point for e-waste and paper waste segregation.
description: A community-driven collection point managed in partnership with local school eco-clubs.
tips: Please flatten all cardboard boxes to save space in the bins.
